name: world-cup-agent-open
description: Provider-based World Cup research backfill and scoring plugin.

interface.shortDescription: Backfill World Cup research and odds from independent providers.
interface.longDescription: Open-source World Cup research plugin with independent Sportradar, The Odds API, and optional crawler provider paths, stable JSON quality reporting, and a keyless offline demo.
interface.defaultPrompt: Run the World Cup research backfill skill for the requested fixtures and report provider selection and data quality.
